zh.Coleshill, Warwickshire, England: 英國瓦維其可爾可爾希爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Katherine Stafford於大約1348年出生在英國斯塔福爾時，她的父親Sir Ralph Stafford48歲，母親Margaret de Audley39歲。她於1357年12月25日與Sir John Sutton III結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.Coleshill, Warwickshire, England: 英国瓦維其可爾可爾希爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Katherine Stafford于大约1348年出生在英国斯塔福爾时，她的父亲Sir Ralph Stafford48岁，母亲Margaret de Audley39岁。她于1357年12月25日与Sir John Sutton III结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Stafford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name principally from Stafford (Staffordshire), but occasionally from other places with similar names, such as Stafford House in Ifield (Sussex), possibly East and West Stowford in East Down (Devon), and three minor places in Devon called Stafford, in Dolton, Broadhembury, and Colyton parishes. The places are all named with Old English ford ‘ford’ as the final element, but have different initial elements. The Staffordshire placename has Old English stæth ‘river bank, shore’; Stafford in Colyton (Devon) has Old English stān ‘stone, rock’; the Sussex placename has Old English stēor ‘steer, bullock’; East and West Stowford (Devon) have Old English stæf ‘staff, stave, rod’; Stafford in Dolton and Stafford in Broadhembury (Devon) may have Old English stæth, stān, or stæf.

variants.name: Stocker
meanings: German and Swiss German (also Stöcker): topographic name for someone living by a tree stump (see Stock 3) or an occupational name for a tree cutter, from Middle High German stocken ‘to clear land’.
German and Swiss German (also Stöcker); Dutch: occupational name from Middle High German, Middle Dutch stocker ‘jailer’.

English: occupational name from Middle English stokker ‘one who sells stockfish’ (fish dried in the air without salt). This was the usual source of the name in medieval London, where a bylaw of 1419 stated that no stokker should board a ship to buy fish (presumably in order to forestall the market).

nameMeanings.name: Katherine

meanings: equivalent of   Katherine  , also occasionally used in the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Katherine Stafford was born about 1348, in Staffordshire, England, her father, Sir Ralph Stafford, was 48 and her mother, Margaret de Audley, was 39. She married Sir John Sutton III on 25 December 1357. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Katherine Stafford est née environ 1348, à Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Ralph Stafford, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Audley, avait 39 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Sutton III le 25 décembre 1357. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille.

de.lifeSummary: Als Katherine Stafford um 1348 in Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Ralph Stafford 48 und ihre Mutter Margaret de Audley 39. Sie hat am 25. Dezember 1357 Sir John Sutton III geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Stafford è nata il circa 1348 nel Staffordshire, England, sua padre, Sir Ralph Stafford, aveva 48 anni e sua madre, Margaret de Audley, aveva 39 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Sutton III il 25 dicembre 1357. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia.

ja.lifeSummary: Katherine Staffordが約1348年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Ralph Staffordは48歳，母Margaret de Audleyは39歳であった。1357年12月25日にSir John Sutton IIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Katherine Stafford(이)가 대략 1348년 영국 스태퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Ralph Stafford(은)는 48세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret de Audley(은)는 39세였다. 그녀는 1357년 12월 25일 Sir John Sutton III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Stafford nasceu aproximadamente 1348, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Ralph Stafford, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Audley, tinha 39 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Sutton III em 25 de dezembro de 1357. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Katherine Stafford родилась около 1348 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Ralph Stafford было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Audley, 39. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Sutton III 25 декабря 1357 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Katherine Stafford nació aproximadamente 1348, en Staffordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Ralph Stafford, tenía 48 años y su mamá, Margaret de Audley, tenía 39 años. Se casó con Sir John Sutton III el 25 de diciembre de 1357. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija.
